Jorge Garcia Brizuela

Software Developer at Plant Science Institute

Bridging the gap between technology and plant science research through innovative software solutions.

Learn More Contact Me

About Me

Professional Background

I am a software developer working at a plant science institute, where I combine my technical expertise with scientific research to develop innovative solutions for agricultural and botanical studies.

My work involves creating data management systems, analytical tools, and research applications that support cutting-edge plant science research and contribute to sustainable agriculture initiatives.

With a strong foundation in both computer science and biological sciences, I bridge the gap between technical development and scientific discovery.

J

Experience

Software Developer

Plant Science Institute

2020 - Present

  • Developed custom data management systems for plant research databases
  • Created analytical tools for genomic and phenotypic data analysis
  • Designed and implemented web applications for collaborative research
  • Worked with researchers to translate scientific requirements into technical solutions

Previous Roles

Various software development positions

  • Full-stack development for enterprise applications
  • Database design and optimization for scientific datasets
  • Research and prototyping of novel software solutions

Technical Skills

Projects

Plant Data Management System

Custom database solution for plant research data

Developed a comprehensive system for managing large-scale plant phenotypic and genotypic datasets.

View on GitHub

Phenotyping Analysis Tool

Web application for plant image analysis

Created a web-based tool that enables researchers to analyze plant growth patterns from images.

View on GitHub

Genomic Data Pipeline

Automated workflow for genomic data processing

Built a scalable pipeline for processing and analyzing genomic data from plant research projects.

View on GitHub

Research Dashboard

Interactive visualization platform

Designed an interactive dashboard for visualizing research results and trends in plant science.

View on GitHub

Scientific Publications

Genomic Analysis of Drought Resistance in Wheat

Journal of Plant Biology, 2023

Collaborative research on identifying genetic markers associated with drought tolerance in wheat varieties.

View Publication

Machine Learning Approaches for Phenotyping Crop Plants

Agricultural Informatics, 2022

Application of computer vision techniques for automated phenotyping in crop breeding programs.

View Publication

Development of a Database System for Plant Genetics Research

Plant Science Informatics, 2021

Description of database architecture designed for managing large-scale genetic datasets in plant research.

View Publication
